meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to use user onboarding to overcome a lack of marketing skills. A professional-grade case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: When marketing skills are absent, your product must market itself. By engineering a high-frictionless user onboarding flow, you turn new sign-ups into advocates. Use Antigravity to structure your data flow and Claude Code to automate the implementation, ensuring users experience your 'Aha!' moment within sixty seconds of account creation.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks coding the perfect feature set, but the traffic graph remains a flat, depressing line. The harsh reality of the indie hacker life is that shipping code isn't enough; if your users don't instantly grasp the value of your app, they churn before the first session ends. You don't need a marketing budget to solve this—you need a better onboarding experience.

Think of onboarding as your silent salesperson. By automating the journey from 'just curious' to 'power user,' you eliminate the need for traditional marketing funnels. In this guide, we will leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to transform your application’s first-run experience into a high-conversion engine that does the heavy lifting for you.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that proves your app provides value. Without this, your onboarding is just noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my codebase and identify the core functional path that leads to user success. Suggest a 3-step onboarding flow that guides users directly to this 'Aha!' moment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Analyze my current project and suggest a 3-step onboarding flow that leads users to the core value proposition.'

steps.title: Build a Frictionless Sign-Up
steps.description: Minimize input fields. Every extra field is a 10% drop in conversion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor my current sign-up form to implement 'Social-first' auth and minimize user friction while maintaining security standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Refactor the authentication module to prioritize social login and minimize registration fields.'

steps.title: Implement Contextual Walkthroughs
steps.description: Use tooltips or progress bars to guide users through the UI instead of a long tutorial video.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lightweight React component for a non-intrusive, step-by-step product tour that triggers only on the user's first login.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /add 'Create a lightweight React onboarding tour component that triggers on first load.'

steps.title: Automate Milestone Emails
steps.description: Connect your onboarding flow to an email service to keep users engaged after they leave the app.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service layer function that triggers a personalized welcome email sequence based on the user's progress through the onboarding steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Integrate a service layer that triggers personalized emails based on onboarding progress events.'

steps.title: Analyze and Iterate
steps.description: Use logs to find where users drop off, then use Claude Code to patch those leaks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the user session logs and suggest a strategy to reduce drop-off rates in the current onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Review the provided logs and suggest improvements to reduce onboarding drop-off rates.'

pro_tips: Never ask for payment during onboarding; focus entirely on the 'Aha!' moment to build trust first.
Use a 'Progress Bar' with a pre-filled state (e.g., 20% complete) to trigger the Zeigarnik effect, making users want to finish the setup.
Offer a 'Skip' button. Forcing a user through a tutorial they don't want is the fastest way to drive them away.
Personalize the UI based on the user's intent survey during registration; show them only the features relevant to their goals.
Implement 'Empty States' that show what the app looks like with data, rather than showing a blank, intimidating screen.
content.next_steps: Deploy your new onboarding flow to a staging environment, perform five manual user tests, and refine the copy based on actual user confusion points.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn your app into a self-marketing machine. Stop waiting for traffic and start converting the visitors you already have. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
